title: Inventory Planning & Fulfilment Analyst
description:
Key Responsibilities:

Inventory Planning & Optimisation

·      Analyse inventory levels to support demand requirements and replenishment plans

·      Monitor inventory turnover, days of supply, and stock ageing

·      Identify slow-moving, excess, and at-risk inventory

·      Support inventory allocation decisions to balance availability and efficiency

Shelf-Life & Expiry Management

·      Track product shelf life and expiry dates across warehouses and locations

·      Ensure FEFO / FIFO compliance in inventory planning and fulfilment

·      Flag and recommend actions for near-expiry inventory (transfers, promotions, write-offs)

Order Fulfilment & Customer Service Support

·      Support order fulfilment by confirming stock availability and lead times

·      Assist in order allocation, prioritisation, and release

·      Coordinate with warehouse and logistics teams to ensure timely delivery

·      Communicate proactively with customer service and sales on shortages, delays, or substitutions

Data Analysis & Reporting

·      Prepare inventory and fulfilment performance reports (fill rate, ageing, expiry risk)

·      Analyse root causes of fulfilment issues and inventory variances

·      Provide actionable insights to improve service levels and inventory performance

Cross-Functional Collaboration

·      Work closely with sales, customer service, procurement, warehouse, and logistics teams

·      Support alignment between demand forecasts, inventory plans, and customer commitments

·      Escalate risks impacting inventory health or customer fulfilment

Systems & Process Improvement

·      Maintain inventory and order data accuracy in ERP / fulfilment systems

·      Support continuous improvement initiatives in inventory planning and fulfilment processes

·      Assist in developing SOPs for inventory allocation and fulfilment controls

Job Requirements:

·      Min. Diploma in Business, Operations, or Supply Chain Management

·      2–5 years’ experience in inventory planning, fulfilment, or supply chain operations

·      Strong analytical and problem-solving ability

·      Customer- and service-oriented mindset

·      Clear communication and coordination skills

·      Ability to balance planning responsibilities with operational execution

·      High attention to detail and time management

·      Experience in FMCG, retail, manufacturing environments

·      Experience managing expiry-sensitive or perishable inventory

·      Understanding of order-to-cash and fulfilment workflows

postedCompany.description:
Hong Food Enterprise Pte Ltd is a well-established frozen seafood & product supplier to Singapore Hotels, Resorts and Restaurant-Chains. Founded since 1980, the HONGFOOD brand had built a reputation of quality & trustworthiness recognized by our partners, customers & Chefs of the F&B industries. Our seafood is sea-catch or freshly harvested from our all-natural certified farms. Our food factories are Internationally certified, meeting International food safety (HACCP), and product quality control standards (ISO 9001), including product traceability from farm to factory to distribution centers.


Our purpose: Provide excellent, ready-to-cook protein sources to satisfy the palettes that crave healthy and delicious seafood. We are spreading our fins and claws to share our treasure trove from the seas. We want everyone to have their seafood and eat it. Huge opportunities await as we swim further and deeper into the minds of seafood lovers, and we want to change the future of eating.


A strong advocate of sustainability, we practice responsible seafood culture. Having peace of mind and enjoying what’s on your plate is our promise. Our work is far from done. No effort is too small to make ourselves even better.


Come join in our mission.
postedCompany.name: HONG FOOD ENTERPRISE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
